text:
(In reply to Romain Tartière from comment #1)
Well... I choosed to remove cmark.
Which removed Gnome... but it was not working when I done it... so not a big deal.

I have since compiled llvm, firefox, and reinstalled Gnome.

I think indeed it is more a limitation of portmaster.


Might learn poudriere eventually... still doing experimentation to learn.

So I guess it should be closed.
